free_text: Isovector and isoscalar spin-flip M1 strengths in 11B
polarized proton beams were used. Both beams
were obtaned from the high-intensity polarized
ion source [ K.Hatanaka et al., Nucl. Instrum.
- Target enrichment: Contamining impurities in the 11B
target were identified by the kinematic energy shift
in the elastic scattering at backward angles, and
those contributions were estimated to be less than
Nucl. Instrum. Methods Phys. Res. A
See NRDF D1912 DATA,38 for detail.
